# Extração: 05-10X Podcast -  Launch Checklist

- **Fonte:** 05-10X Podcast -  Launch Checklist.pdf
- **Tipo:** PDF
- **Páginas:** 0
- **Tamanho:** 2.52 MB

---

Define your overall goals of your podcast
Research competitors and popular shows
Get clarity on audience and target personas
Decide on overall format and genre of show
Choose show name and directory category
Create landing pages for collecting opt-ins
Create new social media profiles (if needed)
OVERALL STRATEGY
Purchase needed equipment (microphone)
Have cover art and show logo designed
Write description with searchable keywords
Have professional show intro and outro made
Plan how to record shows (video or audio)
Decide on editing solution (outsource or DIY)
Make show notes plan (outline, posting, etc)
Select hosting solution and set up account
SHOW PREPARATION
Create general show outline and target length
Plan out topics for first few months of shows
Schedule for launch and consistent releases
Record the first 3 to 5 episodes of your show
Submit RSS feed to Apple Podcast directory
Submit RSS feed to any/all other directories
Share show on social media and with contacts
Promote and advertise everywhere you can!
BRING IT TO LIFE
